Merge '小规模采矿场地\mine area_jialinjiang basin, China';'小规模采矿场地\mine area_Manica, Mozambique projected';'小规模采矿场地\mine area_Bonsa River, southwestern Ghana';小规模采矿场地\mine_area_iron_hebei,_China;'小规模采矿场地\mine area_Serra Pelada, Brizal' C:\Users\X\Documents\ArcGIS\Default.gdb\jialinjiang_basin_Merge "OBJECTID "OBJECTID" true true false 10 Long 0 10 ,First,#,小规模采矿场地\mine area_jialinjiang basin, China,OBJECTID,-1,-1,小规模采矿场地\mine area_Bonsa River, southwestern Ghana,OBJECTID,-1,-1,小规模采矿场地\mine_area_iron_hebei,_China,OBJECTID,-1,-1;Name "Name" true true false 254 Text 0 0 ,First,#,小规模采矿场地\mine area_jialinjiang basin, China,Name,-1,-1,小规模采矿场地\mine area_Manica, Mozambique projected,Name,-1,-1,小规模采矿场地\mine area_Bonsa River, southwestern Ghana,Name,-1,-1,小规模采矿场地\mine_area_iron_hebei,_China,Name,-1,-1,小规模采矿场地\mine area_Serra Pelada, Brizal,Name,-1,-1;Shape_Le_1 "Shape_Le_1" true true false 19 Double 0 0 ,First,#,小规模采矿场地\mine area_jialinjiang basin, China,Shape_Le_1,-1,-1,小规模采矿场地\mine area_Bonsa River, southwestern Ghana,Shape_Le_1,-1,-1,小规模采矿场地\mine_area_iron_hebei,_China,Shape_Le_1,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" true true false 19 Double 0 0 ,First,#,小规模采矿场地\mine area_jialinjiang basin, China,Shape_Area,-1,-1,小规模采矿场地\mine area_Manica, Mozambique projected,Shape_Area,-1,-1,小规模采矿场地\mine area_Bonsa River, southwestern Ghana,Shape_Area,-1,-1,小规模采矿场地\mine_area_iron_hebei,_China,Shape_Area,-1,-1,小规模采矿场地\mine area_Serra Pelada, Brizal,Shape_Area,-1,-1"
